scripts.db:migrate:status:compose: docker compose run --rm -w /workspace/apps/api -e DATABASE_URL=postgresql://vendora:vendora@postgres:5432/vendora notification-worker npx prisma migrate status
scripts.runtime:h1-email-live-provider:compose: docker compose run --rm -w /workspace/apps/api -e DATABASE_URL=postgresql://vendora:vendora@postgres:5432/vendora -e EMAIL_PROVIDER=resend -e RESEND_API_KEY -e EMAIL_FROM -e EMAIL_LIVE_TEST_RECIPIENT notification-worker npm run runtime:h1-email-live-provider
